abilities.name: "Everything Must Go!"
abilities.text: When this model declares an action printed on its stat card, it may discard an Artifact upgrade from itself. If it does so, the action receives a (+).

abilities.name: Manipulative
abilities.text: If this model has not yet activated this turn, enemy models may not cheat fate in opposed duels with this model.

actions.name: Sales Pitch
actions.effects: Deal +1 damage to the target for each ally within 2" of the target (to a maximum of +2).

triggers.name: Hard Bargain
triggers.text: This model and the target both discard the top card of their fate deck. If this model's discarded card is higher, draw that card.

triggers.name: Imitated Art
triggers.text: An ally within 3" of this model gains a Replica token.

actions.name: Inflated Worth
actions.effects: Make either two Scheme markers, or a Scheme and a Remains marker within range.

triggers.name: Imitated Art
triggers.text: An ally within 3" of this model gains a Replica token.
